label: PASS
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 0 before five failed StartSession authentications. The source says TryLimit 0 means there is no limit and Tries remains 0, so the later correct userpin authentication may succeed.

label: PASS
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 2, then has two failed session-start authentications. The source says failed attempts increment Tries and, once Tries equals a nonzero TryLimit, further authentication attempts shall fail until reset, so NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 2, then has two failed session-start authentications. At that point Tries equals the nonzero TryLimit, so the source requires further attempts to fail until reset; the target SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 1 and Persistence false, then one failed attempt reaches the limit. The source says Tries is reset to 0 after a power cycle when Persistence is false, so the later correct userpin authentication may succeed.

label: PASS
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 1 and Persistence false, then one failed attempt reaches the limit. The source says Hardware Reset shall not reset Tries even when Persistence is false, so the later authentication must remain locked out and NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_PIN_User1 is configured with TryLimit 1 and Persistence false, then one failed attempt reaches the limit. The source says Hardware Reset shall not reset Tries even when Persistence is false, so the target SUCCESS after HardwareReset is not compliant.
